source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A rigid tank with 0.5 kg ammonia at 1600 kPa, 160\circ\text{C} is cooled in a reversible process by giving heat to a reversible heat engine that has its cold side at ambient temperature, 20\circ\text{C}. The ammonia eventually reaches 20\circ\text{C} and the process stops. Find the work output of the heat engine.

The ammonia eventually reaches 20\circ\text{C} and the process stops. Find the work output of the heat engine.
